name: 衝突開場
description: 開場即是父親對女主的怒罵與逼婚，瞬間建立壓迫感和觀眾對女主的同情心理，讓觀眾立刻想知道女主如何反抗。

examples.drama_title: 💔Unloved girl no longer tries to please biased family &  makes them cry! KDrama【ENG SUB】【FULL】
examples.excerpt: 「混帳東西，你還知道回來。程風剛打電話過來說你跟他分手了，你現在馬上當著我的面打電話給他，跟他認錯」

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn as unloved daughter, I crush scheming sister!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: （字幕資料不足，基於標題和描述推斷）'scheming sister' 表明姐姐的心機行為是核心衝突觸發點，#BigHeroine'sCounterattack 標籤暗示衝突從一開始就被建立

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: Since when were you my girlfriend? I never said I liked you. And I definitely never asked you to be falling over yourself for me. / So, everything I did for you meant nothing? / Yeah.

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: Laura, you dare to drug me? Ever since you made me the queen, you have never touched me for 5 years. I was left with no choice... Thomas Lake is found guilty of forming factions, engaging in bribery, corruption, and disregard for human life. He shall be executed today at the public square. The Empress Laura Lake is hereby stripped of her title, administered a sterility elixir, and confined to the cold palace for reflection.
